title: Shoe Brush Set, Horsehair Brushes, polish brush, 3 Pcs Shoe Polish Brushes + 1 PCS Plush Polishing Glove, Ideal for Boots, Car Seats, Bags, Sofas
features: 【 4 Pack Shoe Cleaning Polishing kit】 The 3 Pcs Shoe Polish Brushes and a plush polishing glove to meet your daily needs of cleaning different leather products

【Easy to use】 Hold the brush in the middle of the handle and gently apply enough pressure till the tip of the horsehair touches the leather. Put your hand into the polishing golve and wipe all over leather product with ease

【Wide Applications】 Pre-cleaning, shining, daily cleaning and so on, different demands will be satisfied. Shoes, glove, furniture, car inside decoration, purse, cap, belt or other leathers product could be clean easily with this shine brush kit

【Premium Quality】These brushes are made of solid beech wood handle with horsehair bristle, gentle and soft, won't scratch the leather. The wood handle is anti-slip, sturdy, big enough to get a good grip on and buff a significant section of shoes and boots and other leather accessories. Artificial wool polishing cloth is designed as a glove for easy use, soft plush is good for protection of leather goods
【Give a gift】If you're looking for a thoughtful gift for a smart-looking friend or family member, Polish Brushes set Is a great choice
